title: 6-plex IF Protocol on the BOND RX (Leica Biosystems)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6obqq","text":"A 6-plex immunofluorescence protocol was optimized on Leica Bond RX Autostainer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Multiplex IF assay on the Bond RX Autostainer (Leica Biosystems) using the Opal multiplex IHC system (PerkinElmer/Akoya Biosciences Cat# NEL871001KT) and the BOND Polymer Refine Detection Kit (Leica Biosystems Cat# DS9800). - Prepare the antibody and the fluorophore dilutions in 6mL Leica BOND tubes (see Ficial M et al for details about reagents, dilutions and order of antibodies). - Fill an empty 7ml Leica BOND container with DAPI. - Fill an empty 30ml Leica BOND container with Dako Protein Block.
Bake the unstained FFPE slides in the Isotemp Oven for 30 mins at 60°C.
Bond Wash Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9590) Time. (min): 2:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Peroxide Block (Leica Biosystems Cat# DS9800) Time. (min): 10:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Bond Wash Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9590) Time. (min): 4:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Dako Protein Block (Agilent Cat# X090930-2) Time. (min): 15:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.

Primary Antibody (diluted in either Leica Biosystems BOND Primary Antibody Diluent Cat# AR9352 or Biocare Medical DaVinci Green Diluent Cat# PD900 M) Time. (min): 40:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Bond Wash Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9590) Time. (min): 4:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.

Post-Primary (Leica Biosystems Cat# DS9800) * Time. (min): 15:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL. *Post-Primary should be used after mouse anti-human primary antibodies only; when using rabbit anti-human primary antibodies, please go directly to step 14. For TIM-3 this step was replaced by: Rabbit anti Goat Link Time. (min): 15:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL
Polymer (Leica Biosystems Cat# DS9800) Time. (min): 10:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Bond Wash Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9590) Time. (min): 6:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Opal Fluorophore (PerkinElmer/Akoya Biosciences Cat# NEL871001KT) Time. (min): 5:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Bond Wash Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9590) Time. (min): 6:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Bond ER Solution 1(Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9961; citrate, pH 6.0) Time. (min): 10:00, Temperature: 98°C, Dispense type: 150 μL.
Start a new cycle of staining from step 5 OR go to step 20
Bond Wash Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9590) Time. (min): 4:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Last cycle of staining:
Deionized Water Time. (min): 2:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
DAPI (PerkinElmer/Akoya Biosciences Cat# NEL871001KT) Time. (min): 10:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
Manually coverslip using Invitrogen ProLong Diamond Antifade Mountant (Thermo Fisher Scientific Cat# P36962).
Deparaffinization and Rehydration - BOND Dewax Solution (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9222) Time. (min): 30:00, Temperature: 72°C, Dispense type: open. - Rehydration.
Bond ER Solution 1 (Leica Biosystems Cat# AR9961; citrate, pH 6.0) Time. (min): 10:00, Temperature: 98°C, Dispense type: 150 μL.
Deionized Water Time. (min): 2:00; Temperature: Ambient; Dispense type: 150 μL.
creator: Miriam Ficial
